description: GET /lambdas/users/{address}/third-party-wearables/{collectionId} must 400 when URN is well-formed but is NOT a collections-thirdparty URN (e.g. collections-v2). The cleaned-to-5-parts URN appears in the message.

body_json.message: Invalid collection id: urn:decentraland:matic:collections-v2:0xabcdefabcdefabcdefabcdefabcdefabcdefabcd not a valid URN
